user.title: Connect to Kinward
user.description: Enter your Kinward backend URL and an integration service token. Create one by running this on the machine hosting Kinward (not inside Home Assistant): `docker compose exec api python -m kinward.cli create-integration-token --name "Home Assistant"`.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Kinward
reauth_confirm.description: The integration token for {base_url} was rejected. Enter a new integration token to reconnect this household.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Kinward backend at that URL.
error.invalid_auth: The integration token was rejected. Check the token and try again.
error.incompatible_api: This Kinward backend reports an API contract version this integration does not support.
error.household_not_configured: This Kinward backend has no household set up yet. Complete household setup first.

abort.wrong_household: That token belongs to a different Kinward household than this integration entry. Reauthentication must use a token for the same household.

provider_settings.title: Model, memory, and assistant policy
provider_settings.description: Choose what LLM this household's assistants use, and which of the two memory systems (Honcho for conversation memory, llm_wiki for household facts) they connect to. Leave a backend set to "none" to keep it truthfully disabled. Also sets household policy for creating additional personal assistants - a person may already have more than one.

data.model_api_key: Model API key (leave blank to keep the current one)
data.max_assistants_per_person: Max assistants per person (0 = no limit)
data.require_admin_approval_for_assistant_cre: Require admin approval to create additional assistants

tool_policy.title: Home Assistant device control permissions
tool_policy.description: Set whether each Kinward assistant capability may control Home Assistant devices freely, only after admin approval, or never. Routine shared devices default to allowed; locks and the alarm system default to denied.

resource_labels.title: Entity label overrides

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Kinward backend at that URL.
error.invalid_auth: The integration token was rejected. Check the token and try again.
error.household_not_configured: This Kinward backend has no household set up yet.
